data_status: FUNDING-DATA-PRESENT — BTCUSDT_funding.parquet is in funding_analysis/. Funding values are forward-filled to 1h bar frequency inside data_loader.py.
notes: Iter#108. Genuinely new axis: VPVR reversal timed to the 8h perp-funding reset (00/04/08/12/16/20 UTC ±1h) with 2:1 asymmetric execution (TP 2x, SL 1x).

Distinguishing axis vs V1/V2: V1 uses SCHEDULED MACRO EVENTS (multi-day); V2 uses DAILY RECURRING SESSIONS (intra-day); V3 uses PERP-FUNDING RESET (a market-microstructure timestamp that happens 3x daily and produces forced-positioning events around the funding payment).

Mechanism: funding rate z-score relative to rolling history at the funding reset signals forced-positioning pressure; combined with VPVR POC distance stretched, we mean-revert within ±1h window around the reset.

Entry: |d_poc|>1.2 AND |funding_z|>1.2 AND time within ±1h of a 00/04/08/12/16/20 UTC funding reset (8h cadence). LONG when funding_z>0 and price stretched below POC (shorts paid + price dropped, fade the squeeze); symmetric SHORT.
Asymmetric exit: TP at +2x ATR, SL at -1x ATR (2:1 reward/risk). Time-stop 6 bars (6h), vol-target 6 bars, max 12 bars (12h).
Single symbol BTCUSDT (funding resets in funding_analysis/ for BTC).
